author: Platform.Maui.Linux.Gtk4 Contributors
name: .NET MAUI Linux App (GTK4)
description: A project template for creating a .NET MAUI app that runs on Linux using GTK4.

Framework.description: The target framework for the project.

essentials.description: Include Platform.Maui.Linux.Gtk4.Essentials (clipboard, device info, preferences, etc.).

blazor.description: Include Blazor Hybrid support via WebKitGTK.
